name: conductor-epsilon-greedy-pattern
description: Conductor wraps Brain with epsilon-greedy prompt selection (EPSILON_START=0.3 decaying to EPSILON_MIN=0.05 over DECAY_PER=50 outcomes). build_prompt() returns (text, prompt_id, context_tokens) and writes metadata to .prism/brain/.conductor_meta.json. Access brain._scores directly for raw queries. Difficulty from avg_tokens + AC count regex.
